name: Wide Vista
description: Figure(s) overlooking a vast landscape from an elevated position.
hld_patterns: {setting}. A figure on a height, surveying the expanse below.
{setting}. A figure at the overlook, the world stretching away beneath them.
{setting}. An elevated vantage — the figure dwarfed by the view.

1: {subject}, foreground, at the overlook's edge, back to camera, small in frame.
2: {subject}, foreground, at the edge, back to camera.
{subject}, beside the first, slightly further back.

background_pool: A vast mountain valley spread below the cliff edge, layers of blue ridges receding into haze, a river glinting like silver thread through pine forest far below, wisps of cloud clinging to the peaks, the foreground rock sun-warmed and rough

An endless desert basin from a high mesa, dune fields rippling toward the horizon, distant mesas and buttes standing like monuments, heat shimmer distorting the air, the sky an enormous dome of faded blue

A coastal cliff overlooking a wild sea, white waves crashing against black rocks hundreds of feet below, a stretch of sandy beach curving away, seabirds wheeling in the updraft, salt spray catching the light
A frozen tundra expanse from a ridge of blue ice, snowfields rolling to a jagged mountain range on the horizon, the sky streaked with aurora light, ice crystals glittering in the foreground
action_pool: one hand shielding their eyes, scanning the distance
adjusting the strap of a heavy pack
planting a walking staff in front, leaning on it
turning to speak over their shoulder
wind whipping their hair and clothes
arms spread wide, taking it all in
removing a hat to wipe their brow
crouching low for a better view
